---
title: "Week 8 — OLS: Theory & Properties"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 8 Overview

Study the Gauss-Markov theorem, statistical properties of OLS, and implement OLS from scratch in Python.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Gauss-Markov Theorem | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Statistical Properties of OLS | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Python OLS from Scratch | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
